goal: Add max rows per page controls to large paginated tables

Add reusable per-page helper and UI component
Wire controls into large table routes/templates including WhatsApp tables

notes: Implemented per-page selector on large server-side tables and WhatsApp client-side group/contact tables.
Web container rebuilt after change because source is copied into image, not bind-mounted.
